_source_text:
BROOKLYN COMMUNITY BOARD 1
Land Use Committee
Tuesday, April 30, 2024, 6:00 PM
435 Graham Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11211

AGENDA

Item 3. CEQR No. 24DCP085K — Environmental Review, Williamsburg Waterfront Redevelopment

Community Board 1 will review the Draft Environmental Impact Statement for CEQR No. 24DCP085K, the Williamsburg Waterfront Redevelopment project. The project involves the development of approximately 2.1 million square feet of mixed-use space at 50-70 Kent Avenue, Brooklyn, NY 11249. The CEQR lead agency is the Department of City Planning.

Written comments on the DEIS are due to the Department of City Planning by May 14, 2024. The Board will consider submitting formal comments by May 7, 2024.
